rule_text: All works AND material procurement (works, stationery, livery supplies, office consumables) costing Rs.1.00 lakh and above must be invited through the e-procurement platform — uniformly across all AP Government departments.
source_clause: GO Ms No 2 / Finance (Works & Projects-F7) Dept dated 03-02-2014, Order Para 4
verification_method: Check tender_id originates from apeprocurement.gov.in and bid-submission was electronic-only

rule_text: GO Ms No 2/2014 supersedes the earlier department-specific e-procurement thresholds previously fixed by T,R&B (works), MA&UD (works/material), and I&CAD (PW:Reforms) departments.
source_clause: GO Ms No 2 / Finance (Works & Projects-F7) Dept dated 03-02-2014 read with GO Ms 171/2004 MA&UD, GO Ms 216/2007 T,R&B, GO Ms 62/2013 I&CAD
verification_method: Apply uniform Rs.1 lakh e-procurement threshold for works and materials regardless of issuing department; older department-specific threshold defences are not valid post-2014
